entry.data:
MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
A SLIGHT CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
CALM WINDS
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

PARTLY SUNNY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH IN THE EVENING, BECOMING LIGHT AND VARIABLE

MOSTLY SUNNY
HUMID WITH HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S
CALM WINDS

MOSTLY CLEAR
HUMID WITH LOWS IN THE MID 70S
CALM WINDS, BECOMING SOUTH AROUND 5 MPH AFTER MIDNIGHT

MOSTLY SUNNY
HOT WITH HIGHS IN THE UPPER 90S
HIGHEST HEAT INDEX READINGS HEAT INDEX READINGS UP TO 110 IN THE AFTERNOON

MOSTLY CLEAR
HOT
LOWS IN THE UPPER 70S
HIGHS IN THE MID 90S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S

PARTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S
